task: Find a list of shorthaired dogs available for adoption within 100 miles of zip code 94587 that are good with kids and cats, and have been on Petfinder for over 30 days.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found and returned a list of matching dogs. Although Petfinder’s UI lacked a 30+ days filter, the agent used Petfinder’s own GraphQL endpoint to apply the other required filters (dogs, within 100 miles of 94587, short coat, good with cats, good with children under 8) and then filtered results client-side using residency.intakeDate > 30 days. The trajectory shows this worked: the API returned 526 filtered dogs total and 144 with intakeDate older than 30 days, and the agent provided a CSV plus sample entries with names and links. This satisfies the task intent of finding a list of qualifying dogs on Petfinder.
final_result_response:
I found 144 matching dogs via Petfinder’s API and saved the full list here:

[Download the full CSV](artifacts/petfinder_shorthaired_dogs_kids_cats_over30.csv)

Criteria used:
- Dogs within 100 miles of 94587
- Short coat
- Good with cats
- Good with children under 8
- Intake/listed date more than 30 days ago
- Sorted by distance from 94587

Nearest matches include:

| Dog | Breed | Distance | Days listed | Link |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Bonnie | Chihuahua & Terrier | 2 mi | 449 | [View](https://www.petfinder.com/dog/bonnie-0c21e18d-a19b-43fa-a858-f5bb41ff8cf1/ca/hayward/pack-lyfe-rescue-ca2950/details/) |
| Scout | Chocolate Lab & Pit Bull Terrier | 2 mi | 201 | [View](https://www.petfinder.com/dog/scout-009f1535-aa29-4a0b-98d2-9e399531d7ff/ca/hayward/pack-lyfe-rescue-ca2950/details/) |
| Bindi | English Bulldog | 2 mi | 306 | [View](https://www.petfinder.com/dog/bindi-07773671-4ba2-465e-a1eb-bf4cc5a0929b/ca/hayward/pack-lyfe-rescue-ca2950/details/) |
| MIKA | Labrador Retriever | 9 mi | 207 | [View](https://www.petfinder.com/dog/mika-e01e4975-5d20-4d46-8d9b-e4aba6ec27f6/ca/castro-valley/adopt-a-doggie-ca2280/details/) |
| KORA | Labrador Retriever | 9 mi | 282 | [View](https://www.petfinder.com/dog/kora-dfe7d09f-0a99-4a47-a5fb-54674f361f34/ca/castro-valley/adopt-a-doggie-ca2280/details/) |

Note: Petfinder returned 526 dogs for the filters. 382 had no `intakeDate`, so I excluded those because I couldn’t verify they were listed over 30 days.
action_history: Opening Petfinder: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.petfinder.com/');
Opening Good With filter: await page.locator('e141').click();
Selecting cats and kids filters: await page.locator('e242').click();
Opening coat length filter: await page.locator('e142').click();
Closing good with menu: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Selecting short coat length: await page.locator('e142').click();
Applying short coat filter: await page.locator('e305').click();
Opening days on Petfinder filter: await page.locator('e145').click();
Extracting visible dog result links: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
